### TST-1: Valid open item [PRIORITY: HIGH] [TYPE: FEATURE] [STATUS: OPEN] [ASSIGNEE: AI]

Some body text.

### TST-2: Alternate assignee casing [PRIORITY: LOW] [TYPE: RESEARCH] [STATUS: CLOSED] [CLOSED_AT: 2026-04-06] [Assignee: HUMAN]

### TST-3: Missing assignee [PRIORITY: MEDIUM] [TYPE: MISC] [STATUS: IN PROGRESS]

### TST-4: Malformed status [PRIORITY: LOW] [TYPE: MISC] [STATUS: BLOCKED] [ASSIGNEE: AI + HUMAN]

### TST-5: Custom values [PRIORITY: CRITICAL] [TYPE: INVESTIGATION] [STATUS: CLOSED] [CLOSED_AT: 2026-04-07] [ASSIGNEE: AI]
Custom values like CRITICAL (priority) and INVESTIGATION (type) are now accepted.

### TST-6: Invalid closed date [PRIORITY: LOW] [TYPE: BUG] [STATUS: CLOSED] [CLOSED_AT: 2026-13-40] [ASSIGNEE: AI]
Invalid dates should warn and keep the item.
